raw_consumer_statement:
Ref. XXXX In late 2024, I purchased a product from XXXX using my American Express card . The wrong item was delivered, and I contacted XXXX to resolve it. After initial attempts failed, I filed a dispute with American Express. XXXX later submitted information during the dispute process claiming they had already refunded me. 

American Express closed the dispute, and XXXX then refused to issue a refund, citing the closed chargeback. Despite XXXX internal records claiming they refunded my card, no refund ever posted to my account. I reviewed every statement and confirmed with Amex customer service that no such credit was ever received. 

To resolve this, I filed a small claims case against XXXX in California ( XXXX XXXX. XXXX ). At the hearing, XXXX represented to the court that they had refunded my Amex card. Based on this representation, the court closed the case. 

However, to this day, no refund appears on my Amex account, and neither XXXX nor American Express has provided documentation proving where or when the refund was posted. 

Emails from XXXX show they believe the chargeback blocked them from refunding, and now refer all inquiries to Amex or their legal team. American Express refuses to reopen the case or credit the funds. Im now stuck between XXXX companieseach blaming the otherwhile I remain out the money. 

I have attached : The court filing and order, XXXX emails admitting the issue, Confirmation that they will not provide a refund due to the chargeback, And evidence that no refund exists on my Amex account.
